data.title: The crypto sector opened weakly on the US stock market, with Strategy (MSTR) down 1.08%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.29%, the S&P 500 rose 0.61%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.89%. The crypto sector generally saw a pullback, with Solana falling 2.29%, Coinbase falling 2.27%, Circle falling 1.99%, SharpLink falling 1.66%, Strategy (MSTR) falling 1.08%, and Bitmine falling 0.10%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Polygon Labs Restructures Workforce Amid Strategic Shift
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Polygon Labs CEO Marc Boiron announced on social media that the company is undergoing a restructuring process following the acquisition and integration of Coinme and Sequence teams. This strategic adjustment involves the elimination of certain overlapping positions to facilitate the company's transition into a blockchain firm focused primarily on payments. Boiron emphasized that the changes are structural and not related to employee performance issues. Despite these adjustments, the overall headcount is expected to remain stable, with a shift in expertise towards payments, wallets, and blockchain infrastructure.

Previously, on December 13, Polygon Labs acquired cryptocurrency payment infrastructure Coinme and blockchain development platform Sequence for $250 million.

data.title: Anchorage Digital Partners with Spark to Launch On-Chain Lending Service
data.description: According to Foresight News, Anchorage Digital has collaborated with Spark, formerly known as MakerDAO, to introduce an on-chain lending service. This platform allows institutions to borrow while securely managing their assets. Phoenix, the developer of Spark, will obtain direct legal ownership of the pledged assets. Anchorage Digital's Atlas infrastructure will oversee collateral management functions, including enforcing liquidations.

data.title: Federal Reserve Anticipates Interest Rate Cuts This Year
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Goolsbee has indicated that interest rate cuts are expected this year. However, he emphasized that data is necessary to confirm the outlook.

data.title: U.S. Unemployment Claims Drop to Lowest Level Since November
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data released by the U.S. Department of Labor on Thursday indicates that initial unemployment claims in the United States unexpectedly fell to their lowest level since November last year. For the week ending January 10, claims decreased by 9,000 to 198,000, defying all expectations from economists surveyed by the agency. Analysts suggest that this unexpected decline likely reflects ongoing challenges in adjusting data for seasonal fluctuations during the end-of-year holidays and the beginning of the new year. The labor market remains relatively stable, with layoffs at low levels and hiring continuing at a slow pace.

data.title: Binance to Introduce Fogo (FOGO) Across Multiple Trading Platforms
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the cryptocurrency exchange is set to expand its offerings by introducing Fogo (FOGO) across various trading platforms. Starting from 2026-01-15 14:00 (UTC), FOGO will be available on Binance Simple Earn, "Buy Crypto", Binance Convert, Binance Margin, and Binance Futures. Users will be able to subscribe to FOGO Flexible Products on Binance Simple Earn, allowing them to earn rewards on their holdings. Additionally, the "Buy Crypto" feature will enable users to purchase FOGO using payment methods such as VISA, MasterCard, Google Pay, and Apple Pay, or through account balances, within an hour of its listing on Binance Spot.

Binance Convert will facilitate trading FOGO against BTC, USDT, and other tokens at zero fees shortly after its listing. On the margin trading front, FOGO will be added as a borrowable asset on both Cross and Isolated Margin, with trading pairs FOGO/USDT and FOGO/USDC available from 2026-01-15 14:00 (UTC). The Portfolio Margin will also support these pairs, enhancing trading flexibility for users. Binance Futures will transition the USDⓈ-M FOGO Perpetual Contract from pre-market trading to standard contracts at the same time, with a transition period that may last up to three hours. This transition aims to stabilize the index price, ensuring smooth trading operations. The perpetual contract will support Multi-Assets Mode, allowing users to trade across multiple margin assets, such as using BTC as margin. Binance emphasizes the importance of risk management strategies due to the volatility of newly listed tokens. The perpetual contract will be available for Futures Copy Trading within 24 hours of launch, subject to Binance's terms and conditions.

data.title: Jump Crypto Transfers Significant Bitcoin Amount to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham reveals that at 21:48, Jump Crypto transferred 241.83 BTC to an anonymous address starting with 12YGEmHZxN. The transaction involved a substantial amount of Bitcoin, valued at approximately $18.97 million.

data.title: Euro Falls Below 1.16 Against Dollar for First Time Since December
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the euro has fallen below 1.16 against the U.S. dollar, marking the first time this has occurred since December 2 of last year. The currency experienced a daily decline of 0.37%.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Bostic Advocates for Continued Tight Monetary Policy Amid High Inflation
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on January 15, Federal Reserve official Bostic stated that due to elevated inflation levels, it is necessary to maintain a tight monetary policy.

data.title: MetaMask officially integrates native support for TRON networks.
data.description: MetaMask has officially launched native support for the TRON network in its mobile app and browser extension wallet. This integration, a collaboration between MetaMask and the TRON DAO, aims to advance its multi-chain expansion strategy. Users can now directly manage TRON assets within MetaMask, interact with native TRON DApps, and exchange assets between TRON, EVM-compatible networks, Solana, and Bitcoin. Furthermore, this update also supports sending USDT and staking TRX on the TRON network. Currently, the TRON network handles over $21 billion in daily stablecoin transactions.

data.title: US crypto market structure bill in limbo as industry pulls support
data.description:
The crypto market structure bill in the US Senate has been delayed amid disagreements among lawmakers and influential cryptocurrency companies.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-crypto-market-structure-bill-limbo-industry-support?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BSX Shares Dip as Boston Scientific Unveils Biggest Deal in 20 Years
data.description:
Boston Scientific stock slipped 3. 6% in premarket trading after the company announced a $14. 5 billion deal to buy Penumbra.
source: https://tokenist.com/bsx-shares-dip-as-boston-scientific-unveils-biggest-deal-in-20-years/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bsx-shares-dip-as-boston-scientific-unveils-biggest-deal-in-20-years

data.title: Inflation Pressure Expected to Persist Until 2026, Says Fed's Bostic
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Bostic has indicated that inflationary pressures are anticipated to continue until 2026.

data.title: Strategy to Announce Q4 2025 Financial Results in February 2026
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Bitcoin treasury company Strategy has announced plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 5, 2026, following the close of the U.S. financial markets. An online video conference will be held at 5:00 PM Eastern Time to interpret and discuss the financial report.

data.title: Dollar Index Experiences Short-Term Increase
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the dollar index (DXY) has seen a short-term rise of 10 points, currently reported at 99.36.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Goolsbee Emphasizes Inflation Reduction as Key Objective
data.description: According to PANews, Federal Reserve official Goolsbee stated that reducing inflation to 2% remains the most important goal. He noted that there is significant room for interest rates to decrease, but emphasized the need for strong evidence of declining inflation.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Goolsby: Expects the Fed to cut rates this year, but needs data to confirm his expectations.
data.description: Federal Reserve's Goolsby: The Fed expects to cut interest rates this year, but data is needed to confirm his expectations.

data.title: CME Group will launch Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar futures on February 9th.
data.description: CME Group, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange Group, announced that it will launch Cardano, Chainlink, and Stellar futures on February 9 to expand its portfolio of crypto derivatives.

data.title: Mantra project leaves 7% of OM supply locked as migration window ends
data.description:
Mantra (OM) announced the last day for its token migration, although around 7% of the supply is still stuck on Ethereum. Matnra's CEO JP Mullin announced team restructuring, citing worsened crypto market conditions and the crash of OM in April 2025.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mantra-om-supply-locked-migration-ends/

data.title: Bitcoin Emerges as Top Cashtag on X Platform
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin has recently become one of the most searched Cashtags on the X platform, as reported by Bitcoin Magazine.
